description: After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.
examples:
Command Example
#
!dns-nsupdate record=test.example.com. value=123.123.123.123
Context Example
#
{
"DNS"
:

outputs.description: If module has modified record DNS.Nsupdate.record DNS record
outputs.name: DNS.Nsupdate.changed

outputs.description: DNS record TTL DNS.Nsupdate.type DNS record type
outputs.name: DNS.Nsupdate.ttl

outputs.description: DNS record value(s) DNS.Nsupdate.zone DNS record zone
outputs.name: DNS.Nsupdate.value

outputs.description: dnspython return code DNS.Nsupdate.dns_rc_str dnspython return code (string representation)
outputs.name: DNS.Nsupdate.dns_rc
